ШЁЫҢвҖҢЪҶЩҲЩҶ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ (Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§) ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮШұ ШҙЪ©ЫҢШЁШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁШі ШіЩҫШ§ШіЪҜШІШ§Шұ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ.

text: ЩҲЩҺ Щ„ЩҺЩӮЩҺШҜЩ’ ШөЩҺШҜЩ‘ЩҺЩӮЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ШҘЩҗШЁЩ’Щ„ЩҗЩҠШіЩҸвҖҢ ШёЩҺЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ЩҒЩҺШ§ШӘЩ‘ЩҺШЁЩҺШ№ЩҸЩҲЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ ЩҒЩҺШұЩҗЩҠЩӮШ§ЩӢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’Щ…ЩҸШӨЩ’Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Thus Iblis found his supposition about them to be true; and except for a section of believers they follow him.
en.ahmedraza: And indeed Iblis made his assumptions regarding them seem true, so they all followed him except the group of Muslims.
en.arberry: Iblis proved true his opinion of them, and they followed him, except a party of the believers.
en.daryabadi: And assuredly Iblis found his conjecture true concerning them; and they followed him all save a party of the believers.
en.hilali: And indeed Iblis (Satan) did prove true his thought about them, and they followed him, all except a group of true believers (in the Oneness of Allah).
en.itani: Satan was correct in his assessment of them. They followed him, except for a group of believers.
en.maududi: Iblis found his estimate of them to be true, and they followed him, except a party of the believers.
en.mubarakpuri: And indeed Iblis did prove true his thought about them, and they followed him, all except a group of true believers.
en.pickthall: And Satan indeed found his calculation true concerning them, for they follow him, all save a group of true believers.
en.qarai: Certainly Iblis had his conjecture come true about them. So they followed himвҖ”all except a part of the faithful.
en.qaribullah: iblis' made his guess true to them; and all except for a party of believers followed him.
en.sahih: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers.
en.sarwar: Iblis (satan) made his judgment about them to come true. They all followed them except a believing group among them.
en.shakir: And certainly the Shaitan found true his conjecture concerning them, so they follow him, except a party of the believers.
en.transliteration: Walaqad saddaqa AAalayhim ibleesu thannahu faittabaAAoohu illa fareeqan mina almumineena
en.wahiduddin: Satan was correct in his assessment of them and they all followed him, except for a band of true believers,
en.yusufali: And on them did Satan prove true his idea, and they followed him, all but a party that believed.
fa.ansarian: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШіШҢ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҙ ШұШ§ [Ъ©ЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҮ ШЁЩҲШҜ: ЩҶШіЩ„ ШўШҜЩ… ШұШ§ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЩ…] ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ.
fa.ayati: ШҙЩҠШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШҜШұШіШӘ ЩҠШ§ЩҒШӘ. ЩҲ Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЩү Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶШҢ ШҜЩҠЪҜШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЩҠШұЩҲЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҶШҜ.
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШҙЩҠШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҠШ§ЩҒШӘШҢ ЩҲ Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЩү Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЩҠШұЩҲЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҶШҜ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ ЩӮШ·Ш№Ш§ЩӢ ШҙЩҠШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҠШ§ЩҒШӘ. ЩҲ Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЩү Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶШҢ [ШЁЩӮЩҠЩҮвҖҢ] Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЩҠШұЩҲЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҶШҜ!
fa.ghomshei: ЩҲ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§Ш·Щ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…ШҢ ШіШ®ШӘ ШЁЩҮ ШөШҜЩӮ ЩҲ ШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШӘ ШұШіШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҫШі Ш¬ШІ ЩҒШұЩӮЩҮ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҮЩ„ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШҙШҜЩҶШҜ.
fa.khorramdel: ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№Ш§ЩӢ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜ (ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ъ©ШұШіЫҢ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶШҜ). ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЪҜЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜЪ©ЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ. [[В«Щ„ЩҺЩӮЩҺШҜЩ’ ШөЩҺШҜЩ‘ЩҺЩӮЩҺ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЫҢЩ’ЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’ ШҘЩҗШЁЩ’Щ„ЩҗЫҢШіЩҸ ШёЩҺЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸВ»: Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШўШұШІЩҲЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ЫҢЩ‘ШӘ ШЁШ®ШҙЫҢШҜ. ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘШҢ Щ…ШӯЩӮЩ‘ЩӮ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ. В«Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЫҢЩ’ЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’В»: ЩҲШ§ЪҳЩҮ (Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЫҢ) ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш№ЩҶЫҢ (ЩҒЫҢ) Ш§ШіШӘ. В«ШёЩҺЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸВ»: Ш§ШҙШ§ШұЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШІЩҲ ЩҲ ЩӮШөШҜ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ШҜШұ ШӯЩӮ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҢ ШЁЩҮ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ… Ш·ШұШҜ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ ШўШіШӘШ§ЩҶЩҮ ЫҢШІШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§Ш№ШұШ§ЩҒ / 11 - 18ШҢ ШӯШ¬Шұ / 38 - 44).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЫҢ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ШёЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘШҢ ШўЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮ [ЩҮЩ…ЪҜЫҢвҖҢ] Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ
fa.makarem: (ШўШұЫҢ) ШЁЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШҢ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ Щ…ШӯЩӮЩ‘ЩӮ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЪҜЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜЪ©ЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ!
fa.moezzi: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШўЩҲШұШҜ ШЁШұ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§Шұ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШұШ§ ЩҫШі ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢШҙ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶвҖҢ
fa.mojtabavi: ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ШўЩҠЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШі ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ- Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ШіШЁШ§ ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…- ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘ ЩҫШі Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ ЩҫЩҠШұЩҲЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҶШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЩү Ш§ЩҶШҜЩғ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ.
fa.sadeqi: ЩҲ ШЁЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШЁЫҢвҖҢШ§Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШўЩҲШұШҜ . ЩҫШі Ш¬ШІ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶШҢ (ШҜЫҢЪҜШұШ§ЩҶ) Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ.

text: ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШіЩҸЩ„Щ’Ш·ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҚвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ Щ„ЩҗЩҶЩҺШ№Щ’Щ„ЩҺЩ…ЩҺвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҸШӨЩ’Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҸвҖҢ ШЁЩҗШ§Щ„Щ’ШўШ®ЩҗШұЩҺШ©Щҗ Щ…ЩҗЩ…Щ‘ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’ЩҮЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШҙЩҺЪ©ЩҚвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ ШұЩҺШЁЩ‘ЩҸЪ©ЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ Ъ©ЩҸЩ„ЩҗвҖҢ ШҙЩҺЩҠЩ’вҖҢШЎЩҚ ШӯЩҺЩҒЩҗЩҠШёЩҢ

en.ahmedali: He had no authority over them save for the purpose of Our knowing who believed in the world to come, and who doubted it. For your Lord keeps a watch over everything.
en.ahmedraza: And Satan had no control over them at all, except that We willed to reveal as to who believes in the Hereafter and who is in doubt of it; and your Lord is a Guardian over all things.
en.arberry: Yet he had no authority over them, but that We might know him who believed in the Hereafter from him who was in doubt thereof Thy Lord is Guardian over everything.
en.daryabadi: And he hath no authority over them except that We would know him who believeth in the Hereafter from him who is in doubt thereof. And thy Lord is over everything a Warden.
en.hilali: And he (Iblis Satan) had no authority over them, except that We might test him, who believes in the Hereafter from him who is in doubt about it. And your Lord is a Hafiz over everything. (AllKnower of everything i.e. He keeps record of each and every person as regards deeds, and then He will reward them accordingly).
en.itani: He had no authority over them; except that We willed to distinguish him who believes in the Hereafter, from him who is doubtful about it. Your Lord is Guardian over all things.
en.maududi: Iblis had no authority over them and whatever happened was in order that We might know him who believes in the Hereafter as distinct from him who is in doubt about it. Your Lord is watchful over everything.
en.mubarakpuri: And he had no authority over them, -- except that We might test him who believes in the Hereafter, from him who is in doubt about it. And your Lord is Watchful over everything.
en.pickthall: And he had no warrant whatsoever against them, save that We would know him who believeth in the Hereafter from him who is in doubt thereof; and thy Lord (O Muhammad) taketh note of all things.
en.qarai: He had no authority over them, but that We may ascertain those who believe in the Hereafter from those who are in doubt about it, and your Lord is watchful over all things.
en.qaribullah: Yet he had no authority over them except that We would know who believed in the Everlasting Life, from he who doubted. Your Lord is the Watcher over all things.
en.sahih: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian.
en.sarwar: He did not have any authority over them except to the extent that would allow Us to know who had faith in the life to come and who had doubts about it. Your Lord is a Guard over all things.
en.shakir: And he has no authority over them, but that We may distinguish him who believes in the hereafter from him who is in doubt concerning it; and your Lord is the Preserver of all things
en.transliteration: Wama kana lahu AAalayhim min sultanin illa linaAAlama man yuminu bialakhirati mimman huwa minha fee shakkin warabbuka AAala kulli shayin hafeethun
en.wahiduddin: but he had no authority over them; We only desired to distinguish those who believed in the Hereafter from those who were in doubt concerning it. Your Lord is watchful over all things.
en.yusufali: But he had no authority over them,- except that We might test the man who believes in the Hereafter from him who is in doubt concerning it: and thy Lord doth watch over all things.
fa.ansarian: ЩҲ Ш§ШЁЩ„ЫҢШі ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ [ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұШҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ] ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШӘШіЩ„Ш·ЫҢ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜ [Ш¬ШІ ЩҲШіЩҲШіЩҮ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ШІ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШіЩҲШіЩҮ ШЁШұ Ш§ЩҲШҢ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШіШЁШЁЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘ] Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЫҢЩ… Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶ ШҜШұ ШӘШұШҜЫҢШҜЩҶШҜ Щ…ШҙШ®Шө Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…Шӣ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati: ЩҲ ШҙЩҠШ·Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШӘШіЩ„Ш·Щү ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШўЩҶЩғЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҠЩ… Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… ШҜШ§ШұЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ЪҶЩҮ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩҠШ§Щ…ШӘ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЪҶЩҮ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШҜШұ ШҙЩғ ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜ. ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҠШІЩү Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШӘШіЩ„Щ‘Ш·Щү ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩғЩҮ [Щ…ЩүвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҠЩ…вҖҢ] ЩғШіЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ Ш§ШІ ЩғШіЩү ЩғЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЩү ШўЩҶ Щ…ШұШҜЩ‘ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҠШІЩү ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ [ШҙЩҠШ·Ш§ЩҶвҖҢ] ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШӘШіЩ„Ш·Щү ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШўЩҶЩғЩҮ ЩғШіЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ Ш§ШІ ЩғШіЩү ЩғЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶ ШҜШұ ШӘШұШҜЩҠШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҠЩ…. ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҠШІЩү ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ghomshei: ШҜШұ ШөЩҲШұШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШіЩ„Ш·ЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘ (ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШӯШұШө ШҜЩҶЫҢШ§ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШҙШҜЩҶШҜ. ЩҲ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЫҢЩ…) Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶЪ©ЩҮ (ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶ) ШўЩҶ Ъ©Ші ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩӮЫҢШ§Щ…ШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўЩҲШұШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ъ©Ші Ъ©ЩҮ ШҙЪ© ШҜШ§ШұШҜ Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢЩ…. ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЫҢШІ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.khorramdel: ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЩӮШҜШұШӘЫҢ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘ (ШӘШ§ ШЁШ§ ШўЩҶ ШЁШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩҲШ§ШҜШ§ШұШҜ. ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШҜШіШӘ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҲШіЩҲШіЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҮЩ… ШЁШҜЩҲ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ) Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ ШӘШ§ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШўЩҶ Щ…ШӘШұШҜЩ‘ШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜ. ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁ (Ш§ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„) ЩҲ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШҜШ§Шұ (ШӯШіШ§ШЁ Ш§ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ) Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«ШіЩҸЩ„Щ’Ш·ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҚВ»: ШіЩ„Ш·ЩҮ ЩҲ ЩӮШҜШұШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘЫҢЩ„Ш§ШЎ. В«Щ„ЩҗЩҶЩҺШ№Щ’Щ„ЩҺЩ…ЩҺВ»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 143ШҢ ШўЩ„вҖҢШ№Щ…ШұШ§ЩҶ / 140 ЩҲ 142 ЩҲ 167ШҢ Щ…Ш§ШҰШҜЩҮ / 94ШҢ Ъ©ЩҮЩҒ / 12). В«ШӯЩҺЩҒЩҗЫҢШёЩҢВ»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩҮЩҲШҜ / 57).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ [ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶвҖҢ] ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШіЩ„Ш·ЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШўЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ШіШұШ§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұШҜШҢ Ш§ШІ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШҙЪ© ШҜШ§ШұШҜШҢ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙЩҶШ§ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘ ШЁШұ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.makarem: Ш§ЩҲ ШіЩ„Ш·ЩҮ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ШҙЪ©Щ‘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЫҢЩ…Шӣ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲШҢ ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІ Ш§ШіШӘ!
fa.moezzi: ЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҙ ШЁШұ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШұЩҲШ§ШҰЫҢЫҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШӘШ§ ШЁШҙЩҶШ§ШіЫҢЩ… ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўЩҲШұШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ШҜШұ ШҙЪ©ЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШұ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶвҖҢ
fa.mojtabavi: ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ЪҶЩҠШұЪҜЩү ЩҲ ШҜШіШӘЩү ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§Щү ШўЩҶЩғЩҮ [Щ…ЩүвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҠЩ…вҖҢ] ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШіШұШ§Щү ЩҲШ§ЩҫШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ Ш§ШІ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩғ Ш§ЩҶШҜШұЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҠШІЩү ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.sadeqi: ЩҲ ШҙЫҢШ·Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЫҢЪҶвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШӘШіЩ„Щ‘Ш·ЫҢ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШўЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўШ®ШұШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШұШҜШҢ Ш§ШІ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШўЩҶ ШҜШұ ШӘШұШҜЫҢШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶЩҮ ЪҜШ°Ш§ШұЫҢЩ…. ЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲ ШЁШұ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁШіЫҢ ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ.

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„ЩҗвҖҢ Ш§ШҜЩ’Ш№ЩҸЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ ШІЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ…Щ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШҜЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ЩҠЩҺЩ…Щ’Щ„ЩҗЪ©ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ…ЩҗШ«Щ’ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҺвҖҢ Ш°ЩҺШұЩ‘ЩҺШ©ЩҚ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҺШ§ШӘЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҺШұЩ’Ш¶ЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ЩҒЩҗЩҠЩҮЩҗЩ…ЩҺШ§ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШҙЩҗШұЩ’Ъ©ЩҚвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’ЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШёЩҺЩҮЩҗЩҠШұЩҚ

en.ahmedali: Say: "Call on those you imagine are gods apart from God. They are not masters even of an atom's weight in the heavens and the earth, nor do they have a share in them, nor is any one of them a helper (of God).
en.ahmedraza: Proclaim, вҖңCall those whom you assume (as Gods) besides AllahвҖқ; they do not own anything equal even to an atom either in the heavens or in the earth, nor do they have any share in them, nor is any one among them an aide to Allah.
en.arberry: Say: 'Call on those you have asserted apart from God; they possess not so much as the weight of an ant in the heavens nor in the earth; they have no partnership in either of them, nor has He in them any supporter.'
en.daryabadi: Say thou: call upon those whom ye assert beside Allah. They own not an atom's weight either in the heavens or in the earth, nor have they any partnership in either, nor is there for Him from among them any supporter.
en.hilali: Say: (O Muhammad SAW to those polytheists, pagans, etc.) "Call upon those whom you assert (to be associate gods) besides Allah, they possess not even the weight of an atom (or a small ant), either in the heavens or on the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor there is for Him any supporter from among them.
en.itani: Say, вҖңCall upon those whom you claim besides God. They possess not an atom's weight in the heavens or the earth, and they possess no share of either, and He has no backers from among them.вҖқ
en.maududi: (O Prophet), say to those who associate others with Allah in His Divinity: вҖңCall upon those whom you fancied to be deities beside Allah. They own not even the smallest particle, neither in the heavens nor on the earth; nor do they have any share in the ownership of either of them. Nor is any of them even a helper of Allah.
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "Call upon those whom you assert besides Allah, they possess not even the weight of a speck of dust, either in the heavens or on the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor there is for Him any supporter from among them. "
en.pickthall: Say (O Muhammad): Call upon those whom ye set up beside Allah! They possess not an atom's weight either in the heavens or in the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor hath He an auxiliary among them.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳInvoke those whom you claim [to be gods] besides Allah! They do not control [even] an atomвҖҷs weight in the heavens or the earth, nor do they have any share in [either of] them, nor is any of them His helper.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Say: 'Call on those whom you assert, other than Allah. They do not possess as much as the weight of an atom in the heavens or earth, nor do they have a partnership in either, neither does He have supporters among them'
en.sahih: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom's weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant.
en.sarwar: Say, (Muhammad), "Ask help from those whom you worship besides God. They do not possess an atom's weight in the heavens and the earth, have no share therein, nor will any of their idols be able to support them."
en.shakir: Say: Call upon those whom you assert besides Allah; they do not control the weight of an atom in the heavens or in the earth nor have they any partnership in either, nor has He among them any one to back (Him) up.
en.transliteration: Quli odAAoo allatheena zaAAamtum min dooni Allahi la yamlikoona mithqala tharratin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi wama lahum feehima min shirkin wama lahu minhum min thaheerin
en.wahiduddin: Call upon those whom you set up beside God! They possess not an atom's weight either in the heavens or on the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor has He any helpers among them.
en.yusufali: Say: "Call upon other (gods) whom ye fancy, besides Allah: They have no power,- not the weight of an atom,- in the heavens or on earth: No (sort of) share have they therein, nor is any of them a helper to Allah.
fa.ansarian: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ [ШіШІШ§ЩҲШ§Шұ ЩҫШұШіШӘЫҢШҜЩҶ] ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ Ш§ЫҢШҜШҢ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ [ШӘШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҮ ЩҮШ§ЫҢШӘШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШЁШӘ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҮ Ш§ЫҢ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШЁШӘ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜШӣ ШІЫҢШұШ§] ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶШҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШІЩҶ Ш°ШұЩҮ Ш§ЫҢ ШұШ§ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ© ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШіЩҮЩ… ЩҲ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ШІ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ.
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ Ш¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҠЩғШӘШ§ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҠШҜ. Щ…Ш§Щ„Щғ Ш°ШұЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўЩҒШұЩҠЩҶШҙ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ ШҙШұЩғШӘЩү ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠЪҜШұЩү ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬Ш§Щү Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҮвҖҢЩү Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Щғ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШҙШұЩғШӘЩү ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩғШіЩү Щ…ШҜШҜЩғШ§Шұ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘ
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ Ш¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ [Щ…Ш№ШЁЩҲШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜ] ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜШӣ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШІЩҶ Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Щғ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ ШҙШұЩғШӘЩү ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШЁШұШ§Щү ЩҲЩү Ш§ШІ Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ЩҫШҙШӘЩҠШЁШ§ЩҶЩү ЩҶЩҠШіШӘ.В»
fa.ghomshei: (Ш§ЫҢ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ Щ…Ш§ШҢ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§) ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ШӨШ«Шұ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЫҢШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ (Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ) ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЫҢЪ© Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ш°ШұЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ© ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш®Щ„ЩӮШӘ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўЩҒШұЫҢЩҶШҙ ЫҢШ§ШұЫҢ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ЩҶЪ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ.
fa.khorramdel: (Ш§ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұ! ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ) ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЫҢШ§ШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ (Щ…Ш№ШЁЩҲШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜ) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ. (Ш§Щ…Щ‘Ш§ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ЪҜШұЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҲ ШІЫҢШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ. ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ) ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ© ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©Щ…ШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШӯЩӮ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЪ©ШӘ (ШҜШұ Ш®Щ„ЩӮШӘ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ©ЫҢЩ‘ШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ШҜШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ) ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ (ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШЁШ§ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ§ШҙЩҶШҜ)ШҢ ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ЫҢШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҲ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ (ШӘШ§ ШҜШұ Ш§ШҜШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Щ…Щ…Щ„Ъ©ШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШҰЩҶШ§ШӘ ШЁШҜЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІЩ…ЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ). [[В«ШІЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ…Щ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’В»: ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜ. ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶШҢ Ш¬Щ…Щ„ЩҮ (ШЈЩҺЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’ ШўЩ„ЩҗЩҮЩҺШ©ЩҢ) Щ…ЩӮШҜЩ‘Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Щ…ЩҗЩҶ ШҜЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҗВ»: ШЁШ¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§. ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш¬Щ…Щ„ЩҮ (Щ„Ш§ ЫҢЩҺШіЩ’ШӘЩҺШ¬ЩҗЫҢШЁЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺ ШҜЩҸШ№ЩҺШўШЎЩҺЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’) Щ…ЩӮШҜЩ‘Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ. Щ„Ш°Ш§ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ЩӢ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜ: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щҗ Ш§ШҜЩ’Ш№ЩҸЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЫҢЩҶЩҺ ШІЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ…Щ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’ ШЈЩҺЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’ ШўЩ„ЩҗЩҮЩҺШ©ЩҢ Щ…ЩҗЩ‘ЩҶ ШҜЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҗ Щ„Ш§ ЫҢЩҺШіЩ’ШӘЩҺШ¬ЩҗЫҢШЁЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺ Щ„ЩҺЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’. В«ШҙЩҗШұЩ’Ъ©ЩҚВ»: Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЪ©ШӘ. ЩҶШөЫҢШЁ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮШұЩҮ. В«ШёЩҺЩҮЩҗЫҢШұЩҚВ»: ЫҢШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҲ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ШЁШұ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ„ЫҢШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜШҢ [Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ШҜЫҢШҜ] Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ… ШіЩҶЪҜ Ш°ШұЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§Ш®ШӘЫҢШ§Шұ ЩҲ ШҜШіШӘ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШҜШұ [Ш§ШҜШ§ШұЩҮ ЩҲ ШўЩҒШұЫҢЩҶШҙ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§] Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ [Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ] ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШәЫҢШұ Ш§ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ (Щ…Ш№ШЁЩҲШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜ) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ! (ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ЪҜШұЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЩҶШҜШҢ ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ) ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҮ Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ© ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ (Ш®Щ„ЩӮШӘ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ©ЫҢЩ‘ШӘ) ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШҙШұЫҢЪ©ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЫҢШ§ЩҲШұ Ш§ЩҲ (ШҜШұ ШўЩҒШұЫҢЩҶШҙ) ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶШҜ.
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЫҢШҜ Ш¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШҜШ§ШұШ§ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ ШіЩҶЪҜЫҢЩҶЫҢ Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘЫҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢвҖҢ
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬Ш§Щү Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҠЩғШӘШ§ [Ш®ШҜШ§] Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҠШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҮЩ…ШіЩҶЪҜ Ш°ШұЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Щғ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ- ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ- ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШҙШұЩғШӘЩү ЩҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҠЩғШӘШ§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ЩҠШ§Шұ ЩҲ Щ…ШҜШҜЩғШ§ШұЩү ЩҶЩҠШіШӘ.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш¬ШІ Ш®ШҜШ§ (Щ…Ш№ШЁЩҲШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜ) ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜШӣ ЩҮЩ…вҖҢЩҲШІЩҶ Ш°ШұЩ‘ЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ© ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҜЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘЫҢ (ЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§ Ш®ШҜШ§) ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЩҫШҙШӘЫҢШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ (ЩҮЩ…) ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ.В»

text: ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШӘЩҺЩҶЩ’ЩҒЩҺШ№ЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ‘ЩҺЩҒЩҺШ§Ш№ЩҺШ©ЩҸ Ш№ЩҗЩҶЩ’ШҜЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ Щ„ЩҗЩ…ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШЈЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШӯЩҺШӘЩ‘ЩҺЩүвҖҢ ШҘЩҗШ°ЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҸШІЩ‘ЩҗШ№ЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩӮЩҸЩ„ЩҸЩҲШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҸЩҲШ§ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ш°ЩҺШ§ ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҺвҖҢ ШұЩҺШЁЩ‘ЩҸЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҸЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЩӮЩҺвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҗЩҠЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ъ©ЩҺШЁЩҗЩҠШұЩҸ

en.ahmedali: No intercession avails with Him except his He allows, so that when their hearts are freed of fear, they ask (one another): "What did your Lord say?" They will answer: "What is expedient. He is the all-mighty and supreme."
en.ahmedraza: And intercession does not benefit before Him, except for one whom He permits; to the extent that when the fear is removed from their hearts by giving permission, they say to each other, вҖңHow splendidly has your Lord spoken!вҖқ They say, вҖңAll that He has proclaimed is the Truth; and He is the Supreme, the Great.вҖқ
en.arberry: Intercession will not avail with Him save for him to whom He gives leave; till, when terror is lifted from their hearts, they will say, "What said your Lord?' They will say, 'The truth; and He is the All-high; the All-great.'
en.daryabadi: lntercession with Him profiteth not save the intercession of him whom He giveth leave. They hold their peace until when fright is taken off from their hearts, they say: What is it that your Lord hath said? They say: the very truth. And He is the Exalted, the Great.
en.hilali: Intercession with Him profits not, except for him whom He permits. Until when fear is banished from their (angels') hearts, they (angels) say: "What is it that your Lord has said?" They say: "The truth. And He is the Most High, the Most Great."
en.itani: Intercession with Him is of no value, except for someone He has permitted. Until, when fear has subsided from their hearts, they will say, вҖңWhat did your Lord say?вҖқ They will say, вҖңThe truth, and He is the High, the Great.вҖқ
en.maududi: No intercession can avail with Allah except for him whom Allah permits (to intercede). When their hearts are relieved of fright they will ask the intercessors: вҖңWhat did your Lord say?вҖқ They will reply: вҖң(He said) what is right, and He is the High, the Great.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: Intercession with Him profits not except for him whom He permits. So much so that when fear is banished from their hearts, they say: "What is it that your Lord has said" They say the truth. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
en.pickthall: No intercession availeth with Him save for him whom He permitteth. Yet, when fear is banished from their hearts, they say: What was it that your Lord said? They say: The Truth. And He is the Sublime, the Great.
en.qarai: Intercession is of no avail with Him, except for those whom He permits. When fear is lifted from their hearts, they say, вҖҳWhat did your Lord say?вҖҷ They say, вҖҳThe truth, and He is the All-exalted, the All-great.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Intercession with Him will not help, except for him to whom He gives permission. When terror is lifted from their hearts, they shall say: 'What did your Lord say' 'The truth' they shall answer. 'He is the Most High, the Great'
en.sahih: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand.
en.sarwar: No intercession with Him will be of any benefit except that of those whom He has granted permission. The angels cannot intercede. They are always submissive to their Lord. Fear vanishes from their heart when (they receive a message from their Lord). They ask each other, "What did your Lord say?" Others answer, "He spoke the Truth. He is the Most High and the Most Great."
en.shakir: And intercession will not avail aught with Him save of him whom He permits. Until when fear shall be removed from their hearts, They shall say: What is it that your Lord said? They shall say: The truth. And He is the Most High, the Great.
en.transliteration: Wala tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu AAindahu illa liman athina lahu hatta itha fuzziAAa AAan quloobihim qaloo matha qala rabbukum qaloo alhaqqa wahuwa alAAaliyyu alkabeeru
en.wahiduddin: No intercession avails with Him, except on the part of one to whom He grants permission. When their hearts are relieved of fear, they will enquire from those to whom permission is granted, "What has your Lord said?" They will answer, "The truth. He is the Most High, the Supreme One."
en.yusufali: "No intercession can avail in His Presence, except for those for whom He has granted permission. So far (is this the case) that, when terror is removed from their hearts (at the Day of Judgment, then) will they say, 'what is it that your Lord commanded?' they will say, 'That which is true and just; and He is the Most High Most Great'."
fa.ansarian: ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ ШҜЩҮШҜ ШіЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜШҢ [ШўЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЩҒЫҢШ№Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§Щ…ЫҢШҜЩҲШ§ШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Щ…Ш¶Ш·ШұШЁШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜ] ШӘШ§ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ§ ШөШҜЩҲШұ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҜЩ„ ЩҮШ§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ШўШұШ§Щ… ЪҜЫҢШұШҜ [ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ… Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩҒЫҢШ№Ш§ЩҶ] ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘШҹ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: ШӯЩӮ ЪҜЩҒШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati: ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШіЩҲШҜ ЩҶЩғЩҶШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ЩғШіЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ЩҲШҜ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІШӘ ШҜЩҮШҜ. ЩҲ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩ… Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЩҠШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШұЩҲШҜШҢ ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘШҹ ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: ШіШ®ЩҶ ШӯЩӮ ЪҜЩҒШӘ. ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҜШұ ЩҫЩҠШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЩү ЩғШіЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҜЩҮШҜ ШӘШ§ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҮШұШ§Ші Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЩҠШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШұШ·ШұЩҒ ШҙЩҲШҜШҢ [Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙШ§ЩҒШ№Ш§ЩҶвҖҢ] ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘШҹ ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: ШӯЩӮ ШұШ§ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜ Ш§ШіШӘ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘЪҜШұЩү ШҜШұ ЩҫЩҠШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§Щү ШўЩҶ ЩғШі ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲЩү Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҜЩҮШҜ. ШӘШ§ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҮШұШ§Ші Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЩҠШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШұШ·ШұЩҒ ШҙЩҲШҜШҢ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜШҹВ» Щ…Щү ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: В«ШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮШӘШӣ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜ.В»
fa.ghomshei: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮЩ… Ш¬ШІ ШўЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШіЩҲШҜЩ…ЩҶШҜ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ (ЩҫШі Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЪҶШҙЩ… ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Щ…ШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ЩҲ Ш®Ш§ШөЩ‘Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШЁЫҢШ§ШЎ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ШҜЩҶЫҢШ§ ЩҲ ШўШ®ШұШӘ ШҙЩҒЫҢШ№ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ) ШӘШ§ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ (ШўЩҶ Ш®Ш§ШөШ§ЩҶ) Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁ (Ш¬Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҲ ШіШ·ЩҲШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЫҢ) ШЁШұ Ш·ШұЩҒ ШҙЩҲШҜ ЩҫШұШіЩҶШҜ: Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ (ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШЁ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ) ЪҶЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜШҹ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШӯЩӮЩ‘ (ЩҲ ШҜШұШіШӘЪ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЩҮ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩҒЩӮШ§ЩҶ) ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШЁШІШұЪҜЩҲШ§Шұ (ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ъ©Ші ШұШ§ Ш¬ШұШЈШӘ Щ…Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩҒШӘ Ш§Щ…ШұШҙ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ).
fa.khorramdel: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШіЩҲШҜЩ…ЩҶШҜ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШҜЩҲ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ (ЫҢ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢЪҜШұЫҢ) ШҜЩҮШҜ (ЩҲ ШўЩҶ ЩҮЩ… Ш¬ШІ Ш®ЩҲШЁ ЩҲ ЩҫШіЩҶШҜЫҢШҜЩҮ ЩҶЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜ. ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҲШӯШҙШӘЫҢ ШЁШұ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҙЩҲЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШұЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜШҢ ЩҲ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШЁЫҢЩҶЩҶШҜ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШЁШҙЩҲШҜ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШӯШ§Щ„ШӘ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҶЪҜШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЫҢШ§ШЁШҜ) ШӘШ§ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ (ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ ЩҶШ§ШӯЫҢЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШөШ§ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜ ЩҲ) ЩҒШІШ№ ЩҲ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁ Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШІШ§ЫҢЩ„ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ. (ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ ШұЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮ ШҙШ§ШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ Ш®ЩҶШҜШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫШұШіЩҶШҜ:) ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ (ШҜШіШӘЩҲШұЫҢ ШөШ§ШҜШұ) ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜШҹ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: ШӯЩӮ ШұШ§ (ШөШ§ШҜШұ) ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜ (Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ) ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜЩҲШ§Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҺЩҶЩҒЩҺШ№ЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ‘ЩҺЩҒЩҺШ§Ш№ЩҺШ©ЩҸВ»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 254 ЩҲ 255ШҢ Ш·ЩҮ / 109ШҢ Ш§ЩҶШЁЫҢШ§ШЎ / 28ШҢ ЩҶШ¬Щ… / 26). В«ЩҒЩҸШІЩҗЩ‘Ш№ЩҺВ»: ЩҮШұШ§Ші ШЁШұШ·ШұЩҒ ШҙШҜ. ШЁШ§ШЁ ШӘЩҒШ№ЫҢЩ„ ЩҒЩҺШІЩҺШ№ЩҺШҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩ„ШЁ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҸЩҲШ§: Щ…ЩҺШ§Ш°ЩҺШ§ ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҺ ШұЩҺШЁЩ‘ЩҸЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’В»: Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш¬Щ…Щ„ЩҮ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ ШұШ§ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜШұ Ш§ЩҲШ¬ ШҙШ§ШҜЫҢ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҙЩҲЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЩӮЩ‘ЩҺВ»: ШҜШұШіШӘ. Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШЁШұШ§ШЁШұ ШҙШұШ§ШҰШ· Щ…Ш°Ъ©ЩҲШұ ШўЫҢШ§ШӘ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш§ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШҜЩҮШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ШӘШ§ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҮШұШ§Ші Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШұШ·ШұЩҒ ШҙЩҲШҜШҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘШҹ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ШӯЩӮШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШЁШІШұЪҜ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.makarem: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш§ЩҲШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮШҢ ШіЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ! (ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ШҜШұ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁЩҶШҜ) ШӘШ§ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁ Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШІШ§ЫҢЩ„ ЪҜШұШҜШҜ (ЩҲ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ ЩҶШ§ШӯЫҢЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШөШ§ШҜШұ ШҙЩҲШҜШӣ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ… Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩҒЫҢШ№Ш§ЩҶ) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ШҜШіШӘЩҲШұЫҢ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮШҹВ» Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: В«ШӯЩӮЩ‘ ШұШ§ (ШЁЫҢШ§ЩҶ Ъ©ШұШҜ ЩҲ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ Щ…ШіШӘШӯЩӮЩ‘Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШҜ)Шӣ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ЩҲ ШЁШІШұЪҜвҖҢЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ!В»
fa.moezzi: ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜ ЩҶШҜЩҮШҜ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш§ЩҲ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ШҜШіШӘЩҲШұ ШҜЩҮШҜШҙ ШӘШ§ ЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЪҜШұЩҒШӘЩҮ ШҙЩҲШҜ Ш·ЩҫЫҢШҜЩҶ ЩҮШұШ§Ші Ш§ШІ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЪҶЩҮ ЪҜЩҒШӘ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ШӯЩӮЩ‘ ШұШ§ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШұШӘШұ ШЁШІШұЪҜЩҲШ§Шұ
fa.mojtabavi: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҶШІШҜ Ш§ЩҲ
fa.sadeqi: ЩҲ ШҙЩҒШ§Ш№ШӘЪҜШұЫҢ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШіЩҲШҜШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢШҙ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҜШ§ШҜ. ШӘШ§ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұШ§ШіЫҢ ШіШ®ШӘ ШЁШұ ШҜЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЪҜШұЩҒШӘЩҮ ШҙШҜШҢ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜШҹВ» ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: В«вҖҢШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШӘ ШұШ§Шӣ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШЁШІШұЪҜ.В»

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҺШұЩ’ШІЩҸЩӮЩҸЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҺШ§ШӘЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҺШұЩ’Ш¶ЩҗвҖҢ ЩӮЩҸЩ„ЩҗвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ‘ЩҺШ§ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ ШҘЩҗЩҠЩ‘ЩҺШ§Ъ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ„ЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ ЩҮЩҸШҜЩӢЩүвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш¶ЩҺЩ„Ш§ЩҺЩ„ЩҚвҖҢ Щ…ЩҸШЁЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҚвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Say: "Who gives you food from the heavens and the earth?" Say: "God. Surely either you or we are on guidance, or are lost in clear error."
en.ahmedraza: Proclaim, вҖңWho provides you sustenance from the sky and the earth?вҖқ Proclaim, вҖңAllah вҖ“ and indeed either we or you are upon guidance, or in open error.вҖқ
en.arberry: Say: 'Who provides for you out of the heavens and the earth?' Say: 'God.' Surely, either we or you are upon right guidance, or in manifest error.
en.daryabadi: Say thou: who provideth food for you from the heavens and the earth? Say thou: Allah; verily either we or ye are on the guidance or in error manifest.
en.hilali: Say (O Muhammad SAW to these polytheists, pagans, etc.) "Who gives you provision from the heavens and the earth?" Say: "Allah, And verily, (either) we or you are rightly guided or in a plain error."
en.itani: Say, вҖңWho provides for you from the heavens and the earth?вҖқ Say, вҖңGod. And Either you, or we, are rightly guided, or in evident error.вҖқ
en.maududi: Ask them, (O Prophet): вҖңWho provides you sustenance from the heavens and the earth?вҖқ Say: вҖңAllah. Now, inevitably only one of us is rightly guided, either we or you; and the other is in manifest error.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "Who gives you provision from the heavens and the earth" Say: "Allah. And verily, (either) we or you are rightly guided or in plain error."
en.pickthall: Say: Who giveth you provision from the sky and the earth? Say: Allah, Lo! we or you assuredly are rightly guided or in error manifest.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳWho provides for you from the heavens and the earth?вҖҷ Say, вҖҳAllah! Indeed either we or you are rightly guided or in manifest error.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Say: 'Who provides for you from the heavens and earth' Say: 'Allah' Surely, either we or you are rightly guided or in clear error.
en.sahih: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error."
en.sarwar: Say, "Who provides you with sustenance from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "It is God. Only one group among us has the true guidance. The others must certainly be in plain error".
en.shakir: Say: Who gives you the sustenance from the heavens and the earth? Say: Allah. And most surely we or you are on a right way or in manifest error
en.transliteration: Qul man yarzuqukum mina alssamawati waalardi quli Allahu wainna aw iyyakum laAAala hudan aw fee dalalin mubeenin
en.wahiduddin: Ask them, "Who provides sustenance for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "It is God"; either you or we are rightly guided or in manifest error."
en.yusufali: Say: "Who gives you sustenance, from the heavens and the earth?" Say: "It is Allah; and certain it is that either we or ye are on right guidance or in manifest error!"
fa.ansarian: [ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ] ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ ШҜЩҮШҜШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш®ШҜШ§. ЩҲ ШЁЫҢ ШӘШұШҜЫҢШҜ Щ…Ш§ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§Шұ ЩҮШіШӘЫҢЩ….
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЪҶЩҮ ЩғШіЩү ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҠЩғШӘШ§. Ш§ЩҠЩҶЩғ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШ§ ШҜШұ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҠЩ… ЩҠШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШўШҙЩғШ§Шұ.
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩғЩҠШіШӘ ЩғЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш®ШҜШ§ЩүШҢ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮШӘ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШ§ ШЁШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘЩҠЩ… ЩҠШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШўШҙЩғШ§Шұ
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩғЩҠШіШӘ ЩғЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹВ» ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ш®ШҜШ§Шӣ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮШӘ ЩҠШ§ Щ…Ш§ШҢ ЩҠШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ ЩҠШ§ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШўШҙЩғШ§ШұЩҠЩ….В»
fa.ghomshei: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ (ЩҶШ№Щ…) ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜ Ъ©ЫҢШіШӘШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ (Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШӯШҜЫҢЩ…) ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ (Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©ЫҢШҜ) Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ Ш¶Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘЫҢЩ… (ШЁЩҮ ШІЩҲШҜЫҢ Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШҙШҜ).
fa.khorramdel: (Ш§ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұ! ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ) ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶШҜ (ЩҲ ШЁШұЪ©Ш§ШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶШ№Щ…Ш§ШӘ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ Ш§Ш®ШӘЫҢШ§ШұШӘШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШ°Ш§ШұШҜШҹ Ш§ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұЩҲЫҢ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®ШӘ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҜЩҶШҜШҢ Ш®ЩҲШҜШӘ) ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш®ШҜШ§. ЩӮШ·Ш№Ш§ЩӢ ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш§ (Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ) ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ (Щ…ШҙШұЪ©Ш§ЩҶ) ШЁШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ Ш¶Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ЩҮШіШӘЫҢЩ…. (ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш№ЩӮЫҢШҜЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… ШӘШ¶Ш§ШҜЩ‘ ШұЩҲШҙЩҶЫҢ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ. ЩҫШі ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§ЩӢ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҮЩ„ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЩҲ ШҜШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЪҜШұЩҒШӘШ§Шұ Ш¶Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ). [[В«Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҺШ§ШӘЩҗВ»: ШұЩҲШІЫҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ЩҶШ§ШӯЫҢЩҮ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҢ ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШұШіШҜШҢ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ: ЩҶЩҲШұ ЩҲ ШӯШұШ§ШұШӘ ШўЩҒШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲШ§ ЩҲ ШЁШұЩҒ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ШұШ§ЩҶ. В«ЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұЩ’Ш¶ЩҗВ»: ШЁШұЪ©Ш§ШӘ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ: Щ…ЩҶШ§ШЁШ№ ШўШЁЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШІЫҢШұШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶШ§ЪҜЩҲЩҶ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘШҢ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§ШұЫҢЩ…вҖҢ
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЪҶЩҮ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹВ» ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҮ! ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ (Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ) ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ Ш¶Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ЩҮШіШӘЫҢЩ…!В»
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұЩҲШІЫҢШӘШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШЁЪҜЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШҰЫҢЩ… ЩҮШұ ШўЫҢЩҶЩҮ ШЁШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘЫҢ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§Шұ
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЪҶЩҮ ЩғШіЩү ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ШўЩҠЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЩҠЩ… ЩҠШ§ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШўШҙЩғШ§Шұ.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ъ©ЫҢШіШӘ (Ъ©ЩҮ) ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҹВ» ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ш®ШҜШ§ШіШӘвҖҢШӣ ЩҲ ШҜШұ ШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШӘ ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЫҢШ§ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁШұ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЫҢШ§ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШўШҙЪ©Ш§ШұЪҜШұЫҢЩ….В»

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щ’вҖҢ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШӘЩҸШіЩ’ШЈЩҺЩ„ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ…Щ‘ЩҺШ§ ШЈЩҺШ¬Щ’ШұЩҺЩ…Щ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ЩҶЩҸШіЩ’ШЈЩҺЩ„ЩҸвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ…Щ‘ЩҺШ§ ШӘЩҺШ№Щ’Щ…ЩҺЩ„ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Say: "You will not be questioned about the sins that we have committed, nor shall we be questioned about your deeds."
en.ahmedraza: Proclaim, вҖңYou will not be questioned regarding the sins you assume we have committed, nor will we be questioned regarding your misdeeds.вҖқ
en.arberry: Say: 'You will not be questioned concerning our sins, neither shall we be questioned as to what you do.'
en.daryabadi: Say thou: ye will not be questioned about that which we have committed, nor shall we be questioned about that which ye work.
en.hilali: Say (O Muhammad SAW to these polytheists, pagans, etc.) "You will not be asked about our sins, nor shall we be asked of what you do."
en.itani: Say, вҖңYou will not be asked about our misdeeds, nor will we be asked about what you do.вҖқ
en.maududi: Tell them: вҖңYou will not be called to account about the guilt we committed, nor will we be called to account for what you did.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "You will not be asked about our sins, nor shall we be asked of what you do."
en.pickthall: Say: Ye will not be asked of what we committed, nor shall we be asked of what ye do.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳYou will not be questioned about our guilt, nor shall we be questioned about what you do.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Say: 'You will not to be questioned about our sins, neither will we be questioned for your actions'
en.sahih: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do."
en.sarwar: Say, "You will not be questioned about our sins nor shall we about your deeds".
en.shakir: Say: You will not be questioned as to what we are guilty of, nor shall we be questioned as to what you do.
en.transliteration: Qul la tusaloona AAamma ajramna wala nusalu AAamma taAAmaloona
en.wahiduddin: Say to them, "You will not be called to account for our sins and we shall not be called to account for what you do."
en.yusufali: Say: "Ye shall not be questioned as to our sins, nor shall we be questioned as to what ye do."
fa.ansarian: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ШІ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜШҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮЩ… Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜШҢ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШҙШҜ.
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ШұШӘЩғШЁ Ш¬ШұЩ…Щү ШҙЩҲЩҠЩ…ШҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ШұШӘЩғШЁ ЩғШ§ШұЩү ШІШҙШӘ ЪҜШұШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҶШҜ ЩғШұШҜ.
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: [ШҙЩ…Ш§] Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ ЩғШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠЩ… ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҙЩҲЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҲ [Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩҠШІ] Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҠШҜ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШҙШҜ
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«[ШҙЩ…Ш§] Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ШұШӘЩғШЁ ШҙШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠЩ… ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠШҜ ШҙШҜШҢ ЩҲ [Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩҠШІ] Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҠШҜ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШҙШҜ.В»
fa.ghomshei: ШЁШ§ШІ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: (Ш®ШҜШ§ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ Ш№ШҜЩ„ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҫШі) ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ШіШҰЩҲЩ„ Ш¬ШұЩ… Щ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮЩ… Щ…ШіШҰЩҲЩ„ Ъ©ШұШҜШ§Шұ ШІШҙШӘ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҲШҜ.
fa.khorramdel: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ш§ШІ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ШІ Щ…Ш§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜШҢ ЩҫШұШіЫҢШҜЩҮ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜ (ЩҲ ЩҫШ§ЩҒШҙШ§ШұЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШҜЩ„ШіЩҲШІЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШӯШ§Щ„ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШі). [[В«ШЈЩҺШ¬Щ’ШұЩҺЩ…Щ’ЩҶЩҺШ§В»: Щ…ШұШӘЪ©ШЁ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ….]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫШұШіЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШІ Щ…Ш§ ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҶШҜ ЩҫШұШіЫҢШҜ
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ШІ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… ШіШӨШ§Щ„ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜШҢ (ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ъ©ЩҮ) Щ…Ш§ ШҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ШЁШұ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЫҢЩ…!В»
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ЩҫШұШіШҙ ЩҶШҙЩҲЫҢШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ… ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫШұШіШҙ ШҙЩҲЫҢЩ… Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШЁШІЩҮЩғШ§ШұЩү Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩҫШұШіЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҠШҜ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҶШҜ ЩҫШұШіЩҠШҜ.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В« (ШҙЩ…Ш§) Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ш¬ШұЩ… Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲЫҢШҜ ЩҲ (Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЫҢШІ) Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲЫҢЩ….В»

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҺШ¬Щ’Щ…ЩҺШ№ЩҸвҖҢ ШЁЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺЩҶЩҺШ§ ШұЩҺШЁЩ‘ЩҸЩҶЩҺШ§ Ш«ЩҸЩ…ЩҺвҖҢ ЩҠЩҺЩҒЩ’ШӘЩҺШӯЩҸвҖҢ ШЁЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺЩҶЩҺШ§ ШЁЩҗШ§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЩӮЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩҒЩҺШӘЩ‘ЩҺШ§ШӯЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҸвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Say: "Our Lord will gather us together and judge between us equitably, for He is the Judge all-knowing."
en.ahmedraza: Say, вҖңOur Lord will bring us all together, and then judge truthfully between us; and He is the Best Judge, the All Knowing.вҖқ
en.arberry: Say: 'Our Lord will bring us together, then make deliverance between us by the truth. He is the Deliverer, the All-knowing.'
en.daryabadi: Say thou: our Lord shall assemble us together, then He shall judge between us with truth; and He is the Great Judge, the Knower.
en.hilali: Say: "Our Lord will assemble us all together (on the Day of Resurrection), then He will judge between us with truth. And He is the (Most Trustworthy) AllKnowing Judge."
en.itani: Say, вҖңOur Lord will bring us together; then He will judge between us equitably. He is the All-Knowing Judge.вҖқ
en.maududi: Say: вҖңOur Lord will bring us together and then He will rightly judge between us. He is the Great Judge, the All-Knowing.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "Our Lord will assemble us all together, then He will judge between us with truth. And He is the Just Judge, the All-Knower of the true state of affairs."
en.pickthall: Say: Our Lord will bring us all together, then He will judge between us with truth. He is the All-knowing Judge.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳOur Lord will bring us together, then He will judge between us with justice, and He is the All-knowing Judge.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Say: 'Our Lord will bring us all together, then, with truth, He will rightly judge between us. He is the Opener, the Knower.
en.sahih: Say, "Our Lord will bring us together; then He will judge between us in truth. And He is the Knowing Judge."
en.sarwar: Say, "Our Lord will gather us all together and issue the true Judgment about our differences. He is the Best Judge and All-knowing."
en.shakir: Say: Our Lord will gather us together, then will He judge between us with the truth; and He is the greatest Judge, the All-knowing.
en.transliteration: Qul yajmaAAu baynana rabbuna thumma yaftahu baynana bialhaqqi wahuwa alfattahu alAAaleemu
en.wahiduddin: Tell them, "Our Lord will gather us together; then He will judge between us with truth and justice. He is the Just Decider, the All Knowing."
en.yusufali: Say: "Our Lord will gather us together and will in the end decide the matter between us (and you) in truth and justice: and He is the one to decide, the One Who knows all."
fa.ansarian: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ [ШұЩҲШІ ЩӮЫҢШ§Щ…ШӘ] Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ Щ…Ш§ШҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ЪҜШұШҜ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶШҜ. ШІЩҠШұШ§ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШӯЩғЩ… ЩғЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§.
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ [ЩҠЩғШ¬Ш§] Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЩү Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩғШұШҜШӣ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЩү Щ…Щү ЩғЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§.В»
fa.ghomshei: ШЁШ§ШІ ШЁЪҜЩҲ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ ШўЩҶ ЪҜШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮШҢ ЩҒШӘШӯ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш№ЩӮШҜЩҮ ЪҜШҙШ§ (ЫҢ Щ…ШҙЪ©Щ„Ш§ШӘ) ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ (ЫҢ Ш§ШіШұШ§Шұ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…) Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.khorramdel: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ (ШҜШұ ШұЩҲШІ ШұШіШӘШ§Ш®ЫҢШІ) ЪҜШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜ ЩҲ ШіЩҫШі ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ (Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§) Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«ЫҢЩҺЩҒЩ’ШӘЩҺШӯЩҸВ»: ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҲШӘ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШҙШ№ШұШ§ШЎ / 118). В«Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩҒЩҺШӘЩ‘ЩҺШ§ШӯЩҸВ»: ЩӮШ§Ш¶ЫҢ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§Ш№ШұШ§ЩҒ / 89).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ Щ…Ш§ШҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ЪҜШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӯЩӮ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҜ (ЩҲ ШөЩҒЩҲЩҒ Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҶЫҢЪ©ЩҲЪ©Ш§ШұШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІШҜ)ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ (ЩҲ Ш¬ШҜШ§Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ) ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ!В»
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ЪҜШұШҜШўЩҲШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§Шұ Щ…Ш§ ШіЩҫШі ШЁЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШӯЩӮЩ‘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ [ШұЩҲШІ ШұШіШӘШ§Ш®ЩҠШІ] ЪҜШұШҜ ШўЩҲШұШҜШҢ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШұШ§ШіШӘЩү ЩҲ ШҜШұШіШӘЩү ШҜШ§ЩҲШұЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ- ЩҠШ§ Ш¬ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү Ш§ЩҒЩғЩҶШҜ-ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҲШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜШӣ ШіЩҫШі Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ ШЁШӯЩӮЩ‘ Ш¬ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ§ЩҒЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁШі Ъ©Ш§ШұЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢ ШЁШіЫҢШ§Шұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§.В»

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щ’вҖҢ ШЈЩҺШұЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗЩҠЩҺвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЩӮЩ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗвҖҢ ШҙЩҸШұЩҺЪ©ЩҺШ§ШЎЩҺ Ъ©ЩҺЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ ШЁЩҺЩ„Щ’вҖҢ ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺШІЩҗЩҠШІЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҸвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Say: "Just show me those you associate with Him as compeers." No, (you cannot), for He is God, the all-mighty and all-wise."
en.ahmedraza: Say, вҖң(Dare you) Show me those whom you have matched with Him вҖ“ never! Rather only He is Allah, the Most Honourable, the Wise.вҖқ
en.arberry: Say: 'Show me those you have joined to Him as associates. No indeed; rather He is God, the All-mighty, the All-wise.'
en.daryabadi: Say thou: show me those whom ye have joined with Him as associates. By no means! Aye! He is Allah, the Mighty, the Wise.
en.hilali: Say (O Muhammad SAW to these polytheists and pagans): "Show me those whom you have joined to Him as partners. Nay (there are not at all any partners with Him)! But He is Allah (Alone), the AllMighty, the AllWise."
en.itani: Say, вҖңShow me those you have attached to Him as associates. No indeed! But He is God, the Powerful, the Wise.вҖқ
en.maududi: Say: вҖңShow me those whom you have attached to Him as His associates (in Divinity).вҖқ Nay, Allah alone is Most Mighty, Most Wise.
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "Show me those whom you have joined with Him as partners. Nay! But He is Allah, the Almighty, the All-Wise."
en.pickthall: Say: Show me those whom ye have joined unto Him as partners. Nay (ye dare not)! For He is Allah, the Mighty, the Wise.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳShow me those whom you associate with Him as partners.вҖҷ No! [They can never show any such partner]. Indeed, He is Allah, the All-mighty, the All-wise.
en.qaribullah: Say: 'Show me those whom you joined with Him as associates; no, indeed; rather He is Allah, the Almighty, the Wise.
en.sahih: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
en.sarwar: Say, "Show me those whom you have related to God as His partner. He is too Exalted to have any partners. He is the Majestic and All-wise God."
en.shakir: Say: Show me those whom you have joined with Him as associates; by no means (can you do it). Nay! He is Allah, the Mighty, the Wise.
en.transliteration: Qul arooniya allatheena alhaqtum bihi shurakaa kalla bal huwa Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu
en.wahiduddin: Say to them, "Show me those whom you have joined with Him as partners. No indeed! For He alone is God, the Mighty One, the Wise One."
en.yusufali: Say: "Show me those whom ye have joined with Him as partners: by no means (can ye). Nay, He is Allah, the Exalted in Power, the Wise."
fa.ansarian: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҙШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮ Ш§ЫҢШҜ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ [ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҶЪҜШұЩ… ШўЫҢШ§ ШөЩҒШ§ШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҲШ§Ш¬ШЁ Ш§ШіШӘ ШҜШұ ЫҢЪ© Щ…Ш№ШЁЩҲШҜ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮШіШӘШҹ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ] Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ [ШөЩҒШ§ШӘЫҢ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§] ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш®ШҜШ§ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ ЩҶШ§ЩҫШ°ЫҢШұ ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШҙШұЩҠЩғ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҫЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҠШҜ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҜЩҮЩҠШҜ. ЩҮШұЪҜШІШҢ ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ЩҫЩҠШұЩҲШІЩ…ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ШӯЩғЩҠЩ….
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҠЩғШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ ЩғШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠШҜШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЩҠШҜ. ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ШҙЩғШіШӘвҖҢЩҶШ§ЩҫШ°ЩҠШұ ШӯЩғЩҠЩ…
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ [ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶвҖҢ] ШҙШұЩҠЩғ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠШҜШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЩҠШҜ.В» ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү Ш№ШІЩҠШІ ШӯЩғЩҠЩ….
fa.ghomshei: ШЁШ§ШІ ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҙШұЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШіШӘЫҢШҜ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ (ЪҶЩҮ ЩӮШҜШұШӘ ЩҲ Ш§Ш«ШұЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜШҹ) ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ЩҲ ЩҮШұЪҜШІШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ШіШӘ ШўЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ЩӮШӘШҜШұ (ШЁШұ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ) ЩҲ ШЁШ§ Ш№Щ„Щ… ЩҲ ШӯЪ©Щ…ШӘ (ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ) Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.khorramdel: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҙШұЫҢЪ© Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ (ШӘШ§ ШЁШЁЫҢЩҶЩ… ШЁШұШ§ШЁШұ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҲЫҢЪҳЪҜЫҢШҢ ШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩҮЫҢЩ‘ШӘ ШЁШ§ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШЁШ§ШІЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ШіШ§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҹ!) ЩҶЩҮШҢ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ! (ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ. ШўШ®Шұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЫҢЪ© Щ…ШҙШӘ ШіЩҶЪҜ ЩҲ ЪҶЩҲШЁ Ш®Ш§Щ…ЩҲШҙ ЩҲ ШЁЫҢвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЩҶШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШіЩ…ШЁЩ„ ЩҲ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҜ Ш§ШұЩҲШ§Шӯ ЩҲ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЪҜШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜШҢ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҮ ЩҲ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШҜШіШӘ Ш®ЩҲШҜШӘШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ ЩҲ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ШҰЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШҙШ§ЫҢЩҶШҜ) ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҒШұЫҢШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ) ЩҲ ЪҶЫҢШұЩҮ ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ШЁШ¬Ш§ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ШЁШі. [[В«ШЈЩҺШұЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҗЫҢвҖҢЩҺВ»: ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЫҢШҜ. ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶЩ… ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ. В«ШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗВ»: ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§. В«ШҙЩҸШұЩҺЪ©ЩҺШўШЎЩҺВ»: ШӯШ§Щ„ (Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЫҢЩҶЩҺ) Ш§ШіШӘ. В«ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺШІЩҗЫҢШІЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЫҢЩ…ЩҸВ»: (ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ) Щ…ШЁШӘШҜШ§ ЩҲ (Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҸ) Ш®ШЁШұ ШўЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШӘЩҒШіЫҢШұШҙ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ (Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺШІЩҗЫҢШІЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЫҢЩ…ЩҸ) ШөЩҒШӘ Ш§ЩҲЩ‘Щ„ ЩҲ ШҜЩҲЩ… (Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҸ) Ш§ШіШӘ. ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ (ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ) Ш¶Щ…ЫҢШұ ШҙШЈЩҶ ЩҲ (Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҸ) Щ…ШЁШӘШҜШ§ ЩҲ (Ш§Щ„Щ’Ш№ЩҺШІЩҗЫҢШІЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЫҢЩ…ЩҸ) Ш®ШЁШұ Ш§ЩҲЩ‘Щ„ ЩҲ ШҜЩҲЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ШҙШұЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҶШіШЁШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲШІЩ…ЩҶШҜ ЩҒШұШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҙШұЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ! ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ! (Ш§ЩҲ ШҙШұЫҢЪ© ЩҲ ШҙШЁЫҢЩҮЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ)ШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ Ш№ШІЫҢШІ ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ!
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ШЁЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ… ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢЩҲШіШӘШҙ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢШҜ ШҙШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶЩҮ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ Ш№ШІЩ‘ШӘЩ…ЩҶШҜ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ…вҖҢ
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШЁШ§ШІЩү ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҠШҜ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩҠШҜ- ШўЩҠШ§ ШөЩҒШ§ШӘ ШҙШ§ЩҠШіШӘЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ШҜШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҮШіШӘШҹ- ЩҮШұЪҜШІШҢ ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶЩ…ЩҶШҜ ШЁЩүвҖҢЩҮЩ…ШӘШ§ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§Щү ШЁШ§ ШӯЩғЩ…ШӘ.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Ъ©ШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ (ШЁЩҮ ЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ) ШҙШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ.В» ЪҶЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШӣ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ Ш№ШІЫҢШІ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ….

text: ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ШЈЩҺШұЩ’ШіЩҺЩ„Щ’ЩҶЩҺШ§Ъ©ЩҺвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҒЩ‘ЩҺШ©ЩӢ Щ„ЩҗЩ„ЩҶЩ‘ЩҺШ§ШіЩҗвҖҢ ШЁЩҺШҙЩҗЩҠШұШ§ЩӢ ЩҲЩҺ ЩҶЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠШұШ§ЩӢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Щ°Ъ©ЩҗЩҶЩҺвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЪ©Щ’Ш«ЩҺШұЩҺ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ‘ЩҺШ§ШіЩҗвҖҢ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ЩҠЩҺШ№Щ’Щ„ЩҺЩ…ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: We have sent you only as a bearer of good tidings and admonisher for all mankind; yet most people do not understand.
en.ahmedraza: And O dear Prophet, We have not sent you except with a Prophethood that covers the entire mankind, heralding glad tidings and warnings, but most people do not know. (Prophet Mohammed вҖ“ peace and blessings be upon him вҖ“ is the Prophet towards all mankind.)
en.arberry: We have sent thee not, except to mankind entire, good tidings to bear, and warning; but most men do not know it.
en.daryabadi: And We have not sent thee save as a bearer of glad tidings and a warner Unto all mankind; but most of man kind know not.
en.hilali: And We have not sent you (O Muhammad SAW) except as a giver of glad tidings and a warner to all mankind, but most of men know not.
en.itani: We sent you only universally to all people, a herald and warner, but most people do not know.
en.maududi: (O Prophet), We have not sent you forth but as a herald of good news and a warner for all mankind. But most people do not know.
en.mubarakpuri: And We have not sent you except as a giver of glad tidings and a warner to all mankind, and most of men know not.
en.pickthall: And We have not sent thee (O Muhammad) save as a bringer of good tidings and a warner unto all mankind; but most of mankind know not.
en.qarai: We did not send you except as a bearer of good news and warner to all mankind, but most people do not know.
en.qaribullah: We did not send you (Prophet Muhammad) for all mankind except to bring them glad tidings and to warn, but most people do not know.
en.sahih: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know.
en.sarwar: We have sent you as a bearer of glad news and a warner to the whole of mankind, but most people do not know.
en.shakir: And We have not sent you but to all the men as a bearer of good news and as a warner, but most men do not know.
en.transliteration: Wama arsalnaka illa kaffatan lilnnasi basheeran wanatheeran walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona
en.wahiduddin: We have sent you as a bearer of glad tidings and a warner for the whole of mankind, but most people have no knowledge.
en.yusufali: We have not sent thee but as a universal (Messenger) to men, giving them glad tidings, and warning them (against sin), but most men understand not.
fa.ansarian: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… Ш¬ШІ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮ ШұШіШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁЫҢЩ… ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… [ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ЫҢШӘ] Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШӘ ЩҲ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ.
fa.ayati: ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШ§Щ…ШЁШұЩү ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҠЩ…ШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Шӣ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁЩҠЩ…вҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ. ЩҲЩ„Щү ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ.
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҠЩ… Ш¬ШІ ШЁШҙШ§ШұШӘЪҜШұ ЩҲ ЩҮШҙШҜШ§Шұ ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§Щү ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… Щ„ЩҠЩғЩҶ ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш¬ШІ [ШЁЩҮ ШіЩ…ШӘвҖҢ] ШЁШҙШ§ШұШӘЪҜШұ ЩҲ ЩҮШҙШҜШ§ШұШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§Щү ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… Щ…ШұШҜЩ…ШҢ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҠЩ…Шӣ Щ„ЩҠЩғЩҶ ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ.
fa.ghomshei: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ… ШЁШҙШұ ШұШ§ (ШЁЩҮ ШұШӯЩ…ШӘ Ш®ШҜШ§) ШЁШҙШ§ШұШӘ ШҜЩҮЫҢ ЩҲ (Ш§ШІ Ш№Ш°Ш§ШЁШҙ) ШЁШӘШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Ш§Ъ©Ш«Шұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… (Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШӘ) ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘЩҶШҜ.
fa.khorramdel: Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ…Щ„ЪҜЫҢ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… ШӘШ§ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮвҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶ (Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШіШ№Ш§ШҜШӘ Ш§ШЁШҜЫҢ) ЩҲ ШЁЫҢЩ… ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ (ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩӮШ§ЩҲШӘ ШіШұЩ…ШҜЫҢ) ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Ш§Ъ©Ш«Шұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… (Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Щ…Ш№ЩҶЫҢ) ШЁЫҢвҖҢШ®ШЁШұЩҶШҜ (ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЪҜШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҶШЁЩҲЩ‘ШӘ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ). [[В«Ъ©ЩҺШўЩҒЩ‘ЩҺШ©ЩӢВ»: ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ. Ш¬Щ…Щ„ЪҜЫҢ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 208ШҢ ШӘЩҲШЁЩҮ / 36 ЩҲ 122). ШӯШ§Щ„ Ш¶Щ…ЫҢШұ (Ъ©ЩҺ) Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§ШіЩ… ЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ ЩҲ (ЩҮ) ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШЁШ§Щ„ШәЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҗЫҢЩҺШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ Ш№ЩҺШ§ЩӮЩҗШЁЩҺШ©. ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ШӯШ§Щ„ Щ…ЩӮШҜЩ‘Щ… (ЩҶШ§Ші) Ш§ШіШӘ. В«ШЁЩҺШҙЩҗЫҢШұШ§ЩӢ ЩҲЩҺ ЩҶЩҺШ°ЩҗЫҢШұШ§ЩӢВ»: ШӯШ§Щ„ (Ъ©ЩҺ) ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШўЫҢЩҮ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШ№ЩҲШӘ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұ ШұШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶШҜ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§Ш№ШұШ§ЩҒ / 158ШҢ Ш§ЩҶШ№Ш§Щ… / 19ШҢ ЩҒШұЩӮШ§ЩҶ / 1).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш¬ШІ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮвҖҢШўЩҲШұ ЩҲ ЩҮШҙШҜШ§ШұШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЪҜЫҢ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұЫҢЩҶЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ
fa.makarem: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш¬ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… ШӘШ§ (ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫШ§ШҜШ§ШҙЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЫҢ) ШЁШҙШ§ШұШӘ ШҜЩҮЫҢ ЩҲ (Ш§ШІ Ш№Ш°Ш§ШЁ Ш§ЩҲ) ШЁШӘШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢШӣ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ!
fa.moezzi: ЩҲ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШӘШұШіШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ
fa.mojtabavi: ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҠЩ… Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§Щү ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…ШҢ Щ…ЪҳШҜЩҮвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁЩҠЩ…вҖҢЩғЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮШҢ ЩҲЩ„Щү ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ.
fa.sadeqi: ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш¬ШІ (ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ) ШЁШҙШ§ШұШӘЪҜШұ ЩҲ ЩҮШҙШҜШ§ШұШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЪҜЩҮШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ (Ш§ШІ ЪҜШІЩҶШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲ ШўЩҶ) ЩҶЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…вҖҢШӣ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұ Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ.

text: ЩҲЩҺ ЩҠЩҺЩӮЩҸЩҲЩ„ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШӘЩҺЩүвҖҢ ЩҮЩ°Ш°ЩҺШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩҲЩҺШ№Щ’ШҜЩҸ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ Ъ©ЩҸЩҶЩ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ШөЩҺШ§ШҜЩҗЩӮЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Instead they say: "When is this promise going to be, if you speak the truth?"
en.ahmedraza: And they say, вҖңWhen will this promise come, if you are truthful?
en.arberry: They say, 'When shall this promise come to pass, if you speak the truth?'
en.daryabadi: And they say: when is this promise to be fulfilled if ye say sooth?
en.hilali: And they say: "When is this promise (i.e. the Day of Resurrection will be fulfilled) if you are truthful?"
en.itani: And they say, вҖңWhen is this promise due, if you are truthful?вҖқ
en.maududi: They ask you: вҖңWhen will this promise (of Resurrection) be fulfilled, if what you say is true?вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: And they say: "When is this promise if you are truthful"
en.pickthall: And they say: When is this promise (to be fulfilled) if ye are truthful?
en.qarai: They say, вҖҳWhen will this promise be fulfilled, if you are truthful?вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: They ask: 'When, if what you say is true, will this promise come'
en.sahih: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
en.sarwar: They say, "When will the Day of Judgment be if what you say is true?"
en.shakir: And they say: When will this promise be (fulfilled) if you are truthful?
en.transliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
en.wahiduddin: They ask, "When will this promise be fulfilled, if you are truthful?"
en.yusufali: They say: "When will this promise (come to pass) if ye are telling the truth?"
fa.ansarian: ЩҲ [Ш§ШІ ШұЩҲЫҢ Щ…ШіШ®ШұЩҮ] Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘЪҜЩҲЫҢЫҢШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ [ЩӮЫҢШ§Щ…ШӘ ЩҲ Ш№Ш°Ш§ШЁ] Ъ©ЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜШҹ
fa.ayati: ЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҠШҜШҢ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЪҶЩҮ ЩҲЩӮШӘ ЩҒШұШ§ ШұШіШҜШҹ
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩү [ЩӮЩҠШ§Щ…ШӘвҖҢ] ЩғЩү Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҠШҜ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: В«Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҠШҜШҢ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЪҶЩҮ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§ШіШӘШҹВ»
fa.ghomshei: ЩҲ (Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: ЩҫШі Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЩӮЫҢШ§Щ…ШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜШҹ
fa.khorramdel: (Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲШҰЫҢШҜ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШіШӘШ§Ш®ЫҢШІЫҢ ШҜШұ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШЁЪҜЩҲШҰЫҢШҜ) Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲЩӮЩҲШ№ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢЩҲЩҶШҜШҜШҹ! [[В«Щ…ЩҺШӘЫҢ ЩҮШ°ЩҺШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩҲЩҺШ№Щ’ШҜЩҸШҹВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЩҲЩӮЩҲШ№ ЩӮЫҢШ§Щ…ШӘ ЩҲ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҶ ЩҶЫҢЪ©Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҮШҙШӘ ЩҲ ЩҲШұЩҲШҜ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҜЩҲШІШ® Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§Щ„ШЁШӘЩ‘ЩҮ ЩҫШұШіШҙ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘЩҮШІШ§ШЎ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЫҢШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЫҢ ЩҒШұШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШұШіШҜ
fa.makarem: Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: В«Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЫҢШҜШҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ (ШұШіШӘШ§Ш®ЫҢШІ) Ъ©ЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜШҹ!В»
fa.moezzi: ЩҲ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЪҶЩҮ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ Ш§ЪҜШұ ЩҮШіШӘЫҢШҜ ШұШ§ШіШӘЪҜЩҲЫҢШ§ЩҶвҖҢ
fa.mojtabavi: ЩҲ ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұШ§ШіШӘЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҠШҜШҢ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ- ШұШіШӘШ§Ш®ЩҠШІ- ЩғЩү Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜШҹ
fa.sadeqi: ЩҲ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: В«Ш§ЪҜШұ (Ш§ШІ) ШұШ§ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҜШҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ [:ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ] ЪҶЩҮ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ…ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢШҹВ»

text: ЩӮЩҸЩ„Щ’вҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЪ©ЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ…ЩҗЩҠШ№ЩҺШ§ШҜЩҸ ЩҠЩҺЩҲЩ’Щ…ЩҚвҖҢ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШӘЩҺШіЩ’ШӘЩҺШЈЩ’Ш®ЩҗШұЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩҶЩ’ЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШіЩҺШ§Ш№ЩҺШ©ЩӢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШӘЩҺШіЩ’ШӘЩҺЩӮЩ’ШҜЩҗЩ…ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: Say: "Determined is the day of the promise, which you can neither put back nor advance an hour.''
en.ahmedraza: Proclaim вҖңFor you is the promise of a Day which you cannot postpone by one moment nor can you advance it.вҖқ
en.arberry: Say: 'You have the tryst of a day that you shall not put back by a single hour nor put it forward.'
en.daryabadi: Say thou: the appointment to you is for a Day which ye cannot put back for one hour nor can ye anticipate.
en.hilali: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "The appointment to you is for a Day, which you cannot put back for an hour (or a moment) nor put forward."
en.itani: Say, вҖңYou are promised a Day, which you cannot postpone by one hour, nor bring forward.вҖқ
en.maududi: Say: вҖңYour day is appointed, you can neither hold back its coming by an hour, nor hasten it by an hour.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: Say: "The appointment to you is for a Day, which you cannot put back for an hour nor put forward."
en.pickthall: Say (O Muhammad): Yours is the promise of a Day which ye cannot postpone nor hasten by an hour.
en.qarai: Say, вҖҳYour promised hour is a day that you shall neither defer nor advance by an hour.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: Say: 'You are promised a Day. You can neither hold it back, nor can you hasten it by a single hour'
en.sahih: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]."
en.sarwar: Say, "That day has already been decreed for you and you cannot change the time of its coming even by a single hour."
en.shakir: Say: You have the appointment of a day from which you cannot hold back any while, nor can you bring it on.
en.transliteration: Qul lakum meeAAadu yawmin la tastakhiroona AAanhu saAAatan wala tastaqdimoona
en.wahiduddin: Say, "A Day has already been appointed for you which you can neither delay nor advance by a single moment."
en.yusufali: Say: "The appointment to you is for a Day, which ye cannot put back for an hour nor put forward."
fa.ansarian: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШӘШЈШ®ЫҢШұ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЫҢШұЫҢШҜ.
fa.ayati: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШўЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ ЩғЩҮ Щ…ЩҠШ№Ш§ШҜ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩү ШӘШЈШ®ЩҠШұ ЩғЩҶЩҠШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩү ЩҫЩҠШҙ Ш§ЩҒШӘЩҠШҜ.
fa.bahrampour: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШЁШұШ§Щү ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҲШ№ШҜЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШұЩҲШІЩү Ш§ШіШӘ ЩғЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩү Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШӘШЈШ®ЩҠШұ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҠШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШҙ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШ§ЩҒШӘЩҠШҜ
fa.fooladvand: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«Щ…ЩҠШ№Ш§ШҜ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЩү Ш§ШіШӘ ЩғЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩү Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҫШі ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜ ШұЩҒШӘШҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШҙЩү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜ Ш¬ЩҸШіШӘ.В»
fa.ghomshei: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШӘЩӮШҜЫҢЩ… ЩҲ ШӘШЈШ®ЫҢШұ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘ.
fa.khorramdel: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШҙШ®Щ‘ШөЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҫШіЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЫҢШұЫҢШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЫҢШұЫҢШҜ. [[В«Щ…ЩҗЫҢШ№ЩҺШ§ШҜЩҸ ЫҢЩҺЩҲЩ’Щ…ЩҚВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ Ш§ШІ Щ…ЫҢШ№Ш§ШҜШҢ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙЫҢвҖҢШЎ Щ…ЩҲШ№ЩҲШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜШұ ШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ: Щ…ЫҢШ№Ш§ШҜЩҢ ЩҮЩҸЩҲЩҺ ЫҢЩҺЩҲЩ’Щ…ЩҢ. В«Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҺШіЩ’ШӘЩҺШЈЩ’Ш®ЩҗШұЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺ ...В»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§Ш№ШұШ§ЩҒ / 34ШҢ ЫҢЩҲЩҶШі / 49).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ Щ…ЩҲШ№ШҜ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Щ…ЩӮШұШұ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ ЩҫШі Ш§ЩҒШӘЫҢШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ЩҒШӘЫҢШҜ
fa.makarem: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В«ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҲШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШӘШЈШ®ЫҢШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ (ШЁШұ ШўЩҶ) ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢШҜ ЪҜШұЩҒШӘ!В»
fa.moezzi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮвҖҢЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜЫҢШұ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢ ЪҜЫҢШұЫҢШҜ
fa.mojtabavi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮвҖҢЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШұЩҲШІЩү Ш§ШіШӘ ЩғЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩү Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҲШ§ЩҫШі ЩҶШұЩҲЩҠШҜ ЩҲ ЩҫЩҠШҙ ЩҶЩҠЩҒШӘЩҠШҜ.
fa.sadeqi: ШЁЪҜЩҲ: В« ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҮвҖҢЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЫҢ [:Щ„ШӯШёЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ] Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШҜШұЩҶЪҜ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ш¬ЩҸШіШӘ.В»

text: ЩҲЩҺ ЩӮЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҺвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ъ©ЩҺЩҒЩҺШұЩҸЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҶЩҸШӨЩ’Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҺвҖҢ ШЁЩҗЩҮЩ°Ш°ЩҺШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩӮЩҸШұЩ’ШўЩҶЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШЁЩҗШ§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШЁЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺвҖҢ ЩҠЩҺШҜЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҮЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„ЩҺЩҲЩ’ ШӘЩҺШұЩҺЩүвҖҢ ШҘЩҗШ°Щҗ Ш§Щ„ШёЩ‘ЩҺШ§Щ„ЩҗЩ…ЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺЩҲЩ’ЩӮЩҸЩҲЩҒЩҸЩҲЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш№ЩҗЩҶЩ’ШҜЩҺ ШұЩҺШЁЩ‘ЩҗЩҮЩҗЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҺШұЩ’Ш¬ЩҗШ№ЩҸвҖҢ ШЁЩҺШ№Щ’Ш¶ЩҸЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ ШЁЩҺШ№Щ’Ш¶ЩҚвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’ЩӮЩҺЩҲЩ’Щ„ЩҺвҖҢ ЩҠЩҺЩӮЩҸЩҲЩ„ЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш§ШіЩ’ШӘЩҸШ¶Щ’Ш№ЩҗЩҒЩҸЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҗЩ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Ш§ШіЩ’ШӘЩҺЪ©Щ’ШЁЩҺШұЩҸЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҺЩҲЩ’ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ ШЈЩҺЩҶЩ’ШӘЩҸЩ…Щ’вҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЪ©ЩҸЩҶЩ‘ЩҺШ§ Щ…ЩҸШӨЩ’Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩҗЩҠЩҶЩҺвҖҢ

en.ahmedali: The unbelievers say: "We do not believe in this Qur'an, nor in what was (sent) before it." If only you could see the sinners when they are made to stand before their Lord, blaming one another! Those who were weak will say to those who were arrogant: "But for you we would have certainly been believers."
en.ahmedraza: And the disbelievers said, вҖңWe shall never believe in this QurвҖҷan nor in the Books that were before itвҖқ; and if only you see, when the unjust will be brought before their Lord; they will hurl allegations on one another; those who were subdued will say to those who were conceited, вҖңIf it were not for you, we would have certainly accepted faith.вҖқ
en.arberry: The unbelievers say, 'We will not believe in this Koran, nor in that before it.' Ah, if thou couldst see when the evildoers are stationed before their Lord, bandying argument the one against the other! Those that were abased will say to those that waxed proud, 'Had it not been for you, we would have been believers.
en.daryabadi: And those who disbelieve say: we shall by no means believe in this Qur'an nor in that which hath been before it. Would that thou couldst see when the wrong-doers shall be made to stand before their Lord! They shall cast back the word one to another; those who were deemed weak will say Unto those who were stiff-necked: had it not been for you, surely we should have been believers.
en.hilali: And those who disbelieve say: "We believe not in this Quran nor in that which was before it," but if you could see when the Zalimun (polytheists and wrongdoers, etc.) will be made to stand before their Lord, how they will cast the (blaming) word one to another! Those who were deemed weak will say to those who were arrogant: "Had it not been for you, we should certainly have been believers!"
en.itani: Those who disbelieve say, вҖңWe will never believe in this Quran, nor in what came before it.вҖқ If you could only see the wrongdoers, captive before their Lord, throwing back allegations at one another. Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, вҖңWere it not for you, we would have been believers.вҖқ
en.maududi: The unbelievers say: вҖңWe shall never believe in this Qur'an, nor in any Scripture before it.вҖқ If you could only see the wrong-doers arrayed before their Lord, each bandying charges against the other. Those who were suppressed will say to those who waxed arrogant: вҖңHad it not been for you, we would have been believers.вҖқ
en.mubarakpuri: And those who disbelieve say: "We believe not in this Qur'an nor in that which was before it." But if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their Lord, how they will cast the (blaming) word one to another! Those who were deemed weak will say to those who were arrogant: "Had it not been for you, we should certainly have been believers!"
en.pickthall: And those who disbelieve say: We believe not in this Qur'an nor in that which was before it; but oh, if thou couldst see, when the wrong-doers are brought up before their Lord, how they cast the blame one to another; how those who were despised (in the earth) say unto those who were proud: But for you, we should have been believers.
en.qarai: The faithless say, вҖҳWe will never believe in this Quran, nor in what was [revealed] before it.вҖҷ But if you were to see when the wrongdoers will be made to stop before their Lord casting the blame on one another. Those who were abased will say to those who were arrogant, вҖҳHad it not been for you, we would surely have been faithful.вҖҷ
en.qaribullah: The unbelievers say: 'We will not believe in this Koran, nor in (the Books) that were before it' If you could only see the harmdoers when they are brought before their Lord! They will argue against each other. Those who had been abased will say to those who were proud: 'But for you, we would have been believers'
en.sahih: And those who disbelieve say, "We will never believe in this Qur'an nor in that before it." But if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their Lord, refuting each other's words... Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "If not for you, we would have been believers."
en.sarwar: The unbelievers have said, "We shall never believe in this Quran nor in the Bible." Would that you could see the unjust having been halted in the presence of their Lord, exchanging words among themselves. The oppressed among them will say to their oppressors, "Had it not been for you, we would certainly have been believers."
en.shakir: And those who disbelieve say: By no means will we believe in this Quran, nor in that which is before it; and could you see when the unjust shall be made to stand before their Lord, bandying words one with another! Those who were reckoned weak shall say to those who were proud: Had it not been for you we would certainly have been believers.
en.transliteration: Waqala allatheena kafaroo lan numina bihatha alqurani wala biallathee bayna yadayhi walaw tara ithi alththalimoona mawqoofoona AAinda rabbihim yarjiAAu baAAduhum ila baAAdin alqawla yaqoolu allatheena istudAAifoo lillatheena istakbaroo lawla antum lakunna mumineena
en.wahiduddin: Those who deny the truth say, "We shall believe neither in this scripture nor in [any] that [came] before it." Could you but see when the wrongdoers will be made to stand before their Lord, casting blame on one another! Those who had been weak will say to the arrogant ones, "Had it not been for you, we should certainly have been believers!"
en.yusufali: The Unbelievers say: "We shall neither believe in this scripture nor in (any) that (came) before it." Couldst thou but see when the wrong-doers will be made to stand before their Lord, throwing back the word (of blame) on one another! Those who had been despised will say to the arrogant ones: "Had it not been for you, we should certainly have been believers!"
fa.ansarian: ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: Щ…Ш§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҲ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ…. ЩҲ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШіШӘЩ…Ъ©Ш§ШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ [ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШӯШ§Ъ©Щ…ЩҮ] ШЁШ§ШІШҜШ§ШҙШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜШҢ ШЁШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ ШҜШұ ШӯШ§Щ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ… ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШҜШЁШ®ШӘЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШұ Ш№ЩҮШҜЩҮ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІШҜ [Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш№Ш¬ЫҢШЁЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ ШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ] Щ…ШіШӘШ¶Ш№ЩҒШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШіШӘЪ©ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШіШұ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢШҜ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЫҢЩ….
fa.ayati: ЩҲ ЩғШ§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШўЩҲШұЩҠЩ… ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩғШӘШ§ШЁЩҮШ§Щү ЩҫЩҠШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ. Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШЁЩҠЩҶЩүШҢ ШўЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ ЩғЩҮ ШіШӘЩ…ЩғШ§ШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЪҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҮШұ ЩғШі ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜШұШҜЩҶ ШҜЩҠЪҜШұЩү Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІШҜ. ШІШЁЩҲЩҶвҖҢШҙШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ЩӮШҜШұШӘЩ…ЩҶШҜШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҠШҜШҢ Щ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўЩҲШұШҜЩҮ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҠЩ….
fa.bahrampour: ЩҲ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ ЩғШ§ЩҒШұ ШҙШҜЩҶШҜ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶ [ЩғШӘШ§ШЁвҖҢЩҮШ§ЩҠЩүвҖҢ] ЩғЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШўЩҲШұШҜ. ЩҲ Ш§Щү ЩғШ§Шҙ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ШёШ§Щ„Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ…Щү ЩғЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩҫЩҠШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІШҜШ§ШҙШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ ШЁШЁЩҠЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ [ЪҶЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮвҖҢ] ШіШ®ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҠЩғШҜЩҠЪҜШұ ШЁШұЩ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜ [ЩҲ Ш¬ШҜЩ„ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҶШҜ ЩҲ] Ш¶Ш№ЩҠ
fa.fooladvand: ЩҲ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ ЩғШ§ЩҒШұ ШҙШҜЩҶШҜ ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: В«ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶ [ШӘЩҲШұШ§ШӘЩүвҖҢ] ЩғЩҮ ЩҫЩҠШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШўЩҲШұШҜ.В» ЩҲ Ш§Щү ЩғШ§Шҙ ШЁЩҠШҜШ§ШҜЪҜШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ…Щү ЩғЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩҫЩҠШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІШҜШ§ШҙШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҠШҜЩү [ЩғЩҮ ЪҶЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮвҖҢ] ШЁШұШ®Щү Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ ШЁШұШ®Щү [ШҜЩҠЪҜШұ Ш¬ШҜЩ„ ЩҲ] ЪҜЩҒШӘЪҜЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҶШҜШӣ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ ШІЩҠШұШҜШіШӘ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЩғШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩғЩҮ [ШұЩҠШ§ШіШӘ ЩҲ] ШЁШұШӘШұЩү ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҶШҜШҢ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҠЩҶШҜ: В«Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҠШҜ ЩӮШ·Ш№Ш§ЩӢ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҠЩ….В»
fa.ghomshei: ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШҙШұЪ© ЪҜЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ: Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ (Ш§ШІ ШӘЩҲШұШ§ШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢЩ„ ЩҲ ШІШЁЩҲШұ ЩҲ ШәЫҢШұЩҮ) Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШўЩҲШұШҜ. (ЩҲШ§ЫҢ ШЁШұ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§) ЩҲ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШұЩҲШІЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ШіШӘЩ…Ъ©Ш§ШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢ ШҜШұ ШӯШ§Щ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ§ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШөЩҲЩ…ШӘ ЩҲ ЪҜЩҒШӘЪҜЩҲ ШЁШұШ®Ш§ШіШӘЩҮ ЩҲ Ш¶Ш№ЫҢЩҒШ§ЩҶ ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁЩҮ ШұШӨШіШ§ЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜЩҶЪ©Шҙ Ш®Ш·Ш§ШЁ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЪҜШұ Ш§ШәЩҲШ§ЫҢ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜ Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӘЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜЫҢЩ…!
fa.khorramdel: Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШўЩҲШұШҜ. Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ (ШӯШ§Щ„ ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШіШӘЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§) ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ШіШӘЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӯШіШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ) ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ (Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЫҢ. ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ) ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ШЁШ§ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ ШҜШұ ЪҜЩҒШӘЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЫҢЪ©ЫҢ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜШұШҜЩҶ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІШҜ. Щ…ШіШӘШ¶Ш№ЩҒШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШІЫҢШұШҜШіШӘШ§ЩҶШҢ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШіШӘЪ©ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШҜШіШӘШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ: Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢШҜ (ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ ЪҜЩ…ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ШұШҜЫҢШҜ) Щ…Ш§ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜЫҢЩ… (ЩҲ Ш§Ъ©ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШұШіШӘЪҜШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЫҢЩ…). [[В«ЩҲЩҺ Щ„ЩҺЩҲЩ’ ШӘЩҺШұЫҢ ...В»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§ЩҶШ№Ш§Щ… / 27 ЩҲ 30 ЩҲ 93ШҢ Ш§ЩҶЩҒШ§Щ„ / 50ШҢ ШіШ¬ШҜЩҮ / 12). В«ЫҢЩҺШұЩ’Ш¬ЩҗШ№ЩҸВ»: ШұШҜЩ‘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ. ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜ. Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ Щ„ЩҲЩ…ЩҮ ЩҲ ШіШұШІЩҶШҙ ЩҲ ЪҜЩҶШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜШұШҜЩҶ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШҜШ§Ш®ШӘЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ш°ЩҲ ЩҲШ¬ЩҮЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶШ¬Ш§ Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜЩ‘ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЩҮШұЪҜШІ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶШҢ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШіШӘЩ…Ъ©Ш§ШұШ§ЩҶ [Щ…ШҙШұЪ©вҖҢ] ШұШ§ ШЁЩҶЪҜШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶШІШҜ ЩҫШұЩҲШұШҜЪҜШ§ШұШҙШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШҙЩҲЩҶШҜШҢ ШЁШ№Ш¶ЫҢ ШЁШ§ ШЁШ№Ш¶ЫҢ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ ШЁЪҜЩҲ Щ…ЪҜЩҲ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ Щ…ШіШӘШ¶Ш№ЩҒШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШіШӘЪ©ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҙЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢШҜ ШЁЫҢвҖҢШҙЪ©ШҢ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ШӨЩ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҲШҜЫҢЩ…вҖҢ
